name: Sunken Ledger
excerpt: The Sunken Ledger is a valuable and dangerous artifact hidden by Fen Caldra.
notes: The Sunken Ledger is an artifact that Fen Caldra found six years ago in a sealed crate within the Salt Warren. He read enough of it to understand its value and danger. Fen has kept it hidden in a location only he knows, contemplating its fate for years without deciding.
